notes:
v2.5.0 Update
⚔️ New HUD themes: Zenith and Rift add two built-in visual styles with shard-style gauges, rotated portrait chips, ornate frames, and tapered bars.
🎚️ Custom resource stages: Each tracked attribute can define stage names, percentage thresholds, label colors, and separate resource bar colors.
📦 Compact resources: Collapsed cards can show up to two mini bars, or an icon plus value without the label.
🎨 Compact card appearance: Collapsed card width, height, border radius, border color, and background color can be set globally or per actor.
🧭 Card, status, and action tools: Right-click card quick edit/reorder, roster order controls, token-name fallback labels, D&D5e activation grouping, and status icon horizontal/vertical/hidden layout.
🐛 Fixes: Iron theme hit feedback, Foundry V14 status icons, safer status icon markup, and PF1 tracked item charge updates.

announcement.title: ⚔️ Stylish Action HUD v2.5.0
announcement.content:
v2.5.0 adds new HUD themes, per-stage resource bar colors, compact-card appearance controls, and status icon layout options.

  • New HUD themes: Zenith and Rift add two built-in visual styles with their own card layouts, action menu styling, and compact forms.
  • Custom resource stages: Each tracked attribute can define stage names, percentage thresholds, label colors, and separate resource bar colors.
  • Compact resource display: Collapsed cards can show up to two resource mini bars, or an icon plus value without the label.
  • Compact card appearance: Width, height, border radius, border color, and background color can be set globally or per actor.
  • Card, status, and action tools: Right-click cards for edit/reorder/remove actions, set roster order, group D&D5e Features by activation type, and choose horizontal, vertical, or hidden status icons.
  • Fixes: Restores Foundry V14 status icons, fixes Iron hit feedback, avoids PF1 item-charge actor data corruption, and hardens status icon markup.
